description: Killed assumption: VR is not the causal lever for GPTZero human-passing. Prompt regime is. Pivoted product framing from 'voice preservation metric' to 'validated assembly prompt with VR as downstream diagnostic.'
notes: Pre-registered 54-variant pilot surfaced the finding. Clarity 0.9 because the null is definitive on the sub-claim. Investment avoided 0 because the academic-mode workflow was already shipping; no net additional build prevented. Pivoting saved the product from shipping a headline metric it couldn't defend.
